guidance: Module capacity rising 2.4GW to 3.6GW; 2.2GW cell line operational in ~90 days.
FY27 revenue target >₹3,000cr (2x); aiming ~20% blended EBITDA margin post cell integration.
5GW solar glass + 5GW ingot/wafer by FY2030; ₹10,000cr revenue vision.
insights: Module capacity 2.4GW (Greater Noida); 2.2GW G12R TopCon cell line commissioning at Kosi, UP.
26,000+ solar water pumps installed; EBITDA margin expanded ~6.5% to ~15% over four years.
concall.orderExecution: Sitting on ~₹1,900cr order book and deliberately slowing new intake to prioritise 3.6GW module plus cell ramp.
concall.source: Alpex Solar Q4 & FY26 Investors/Analysts Meet transcript, NSE filing dated 28-May-2026
